title: Trinkets GUI Revision Patch
description: Compat pack for Trinkets and GUI Revision
body:
[Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) mod resource pack in the style of [GUI Revision](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision), also with Supplementaries support
